## Problem

What are you trying to do that Wright doesn't support today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you've thought about, and why you didn't go with them.

## Additional context

Anything else relevant — links, examples from other tools, etc.
